name: Bob's Bourbon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the bourbon, brown sugar, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, white vinegar, garlic, dry mustard, salt, and pepper until well combined.
2. Place the chicken in a shallow dish or container and pour the glaze over it, ensuring each piece is coated with a thin layer.
3. Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
4. Place the chicken on the hot grill and cook for 6-8 minutes per side, basting occasionally with the remaining glaze from the bowl.
5. Remove the chicken from the grill when cooked through and serve immediately.
